Case# Conversation.Event.conversationEnded(_:_:)

Informs that system that a conversation ended at a point in time with a reason.iOS 17.4+iPadOS 17.4+Mac Catalyst 17.4+visionOS 1.1+watchOS 10.4+

```
case conversationEnded(Date, Conversation.EndedReason)
```

## [See Also](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationended(_:_:)#see-also)

[`case conversationConnected(Date)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationconnected(_:))Informs that system that conversation successfully connected at a point in time.[`case conversationStartedConnecting(Date)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationstartedconnecting(_:))Informs the system that a conversation has started to connect participants at a point in time.[`case conversationUpdated(Conversation.Update)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationupdated(_:))Updates a conversation’s attributes and capabilities.
